title: Rorworr (disambiguation)
content:
'''Rorworr''' was the name of two [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiees]]:

*'''[[Rorworr (Kashyyyk)|Rorworr]]''', a Wookiee from [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]] during the [[Jedi Civil War]]
*'''[[Rorworr (Naboo)|Rorworr]]''', a Wookiee raised on [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]], active during the [[Battle of Naboo/Legends|Battle of Naboo]], the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], the [[Imperial Era/Legends|Imperial Period]], and the [[Post-Imperial era/Legends|Post-Imperial era]].

{{Disambig}}
